article_title: HttpClient 在 C# 中的完全指南
core_theme: 从 new HttpClient() 的反模式到 IHttpClientFactory 的类型化客户端、弹性策略、流式响应和 HTTP/3，覆盖 HttpClient 正确用法全景
reader_takeaway: 理解三种反模式为什么是错的、IHttpClientFactory 的 handler 池化怎么解决问题、以及类型化客户端 + resilience + 流式响应在生产中的组合用法
summary_angle: 从三个反模式（socket 耗尽、DNS 过期、错误范围 using）到正确模式（IHttpClientFactory + typed client + resilience）的完整路径

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「Antipattern 1-3」节：new/dispose 导致 socket 耗尽、static singleton DNS 过期、错误范围 using
information_blocks.visual_idea: 画面左侧三个碎裂/阻塞/过期的连接符号

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「IHttpClientFactory」节：handler 池化 + 2分钟轮换 + transient typed client
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央工厂枢纽，handler 池循环输出干净客户端

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「Decision Table」和 typed/named/basic 对比：typed client + resilience + streaming
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧三层递进：basic → named → typed client + resilience + streaming + HTTP/3

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「Summary: When to Use Which Pattern」决策矩阵
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右下角一个完整的生产就绪客户端符号

main_metaphor: 工厂流水线：3 个反模式被输入，经过 handler 池化核心，产出类型化客户端 + 弹性 + 流式响应的生产就绪方案
primary_subject: 一个中心化的工厂枢纽，左侧接收破碎的反模式输入，右侧产出结构化的生产就绪客户端
subject_action: 工厂正在处理反模式并产出现代化的 HttpClient 方案
composition: 居中工厂，左侧问题输入 → 中央池化机制 → 右侧结构化输出
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: black-and-white printmaking look, carved textures, bold shadows, high contrast, poster-like but no title text
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从 40 项风格池随机选中（#19）；高对比度版画风格适合表达「错误 vs 正确」的强烈对照，和三种反模式的戏剧性对比
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 验证左侧反模式/中央工厂/右侧方案的版画式对比布局
revision_targets: 版画风格与技术主题的兼容性
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: The complete guide to HttpClient in C# — from 3 antipatterns (socket exhaustion, DNS staleness, wrong-scope using) to the correct IHttpClientFactory pattern with typed clients, resilience, streaming, and HTTP/3. Summary angle: The journey from three broken approaches to a production-ready typed client pattern. Narrative flow: before-after. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 3-4 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- Problem: Three antipatterns on the left — new/dispose socket exhaustion, static singleton DNS staleness, wrong-scope using — each as a distinct broken symbol, labeled 3反模式 with number 3
- Mechanism: Central factory hub in the middle with handler pool rotation cycle, outputting clean HttpClient objects, labeled Handler池化 with 2min
- Step: Right side showing typed client pattern progression with resilience handler, streaming, and HTTP/3 layers, labeled 类型化客户端
- Takeaway: Production-ready symbol at bottom right, labeled dotnet-10-ready

Main metaphor: A factory assembly line — broken inputs enter from the left, handler pooling core processes them in the center, production-ready typed client + resilience + streaming outputs on the right.
Subject: A central factory/distributor hub, transforming broken approaches into modern HttpClient patterns.
Composition: Center factory hub, left problem inputs → center pooling mechanism → right structured output.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with black-and-white printmaking look, carved textures, bold shadows, high contrast, poster-like but no title text. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: black and white high contrast, dark gray, mid gray, optional single accent color sparingly.
Visible text policy: allow only 4 short Chinese labels or number chips. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no unrelated icon collage.
Avoid: code rain, fake terminals, fake dashboards, cyberpunk purple-blue light, floating chips, neon skyscrapers, excessive bright colors that clash with printmaking style.
